code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    mut out = ""
    mut i = 0
    mut in_word = false
    mut had_word = false
    let n = string.len(line)
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws(b)
          in_word = false
        else
          if not in_word
            if had_word
              out = "#{out} "
            end
            had_word = true
            in_word = true
            if b >= 97 and b <= 122
              out = "#{out}#{string.from_byte(b - 32)}"
            else
              out = "#{out}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
            end
          else
            out = "#{out}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(out)
  when None
    ()
  end
end
